testbenches.name: tb_zc_chirp_frame_detector_iqcal
testbenches.description:
Self-checking or stimulus-focused testbench for zc chirp frame detector iqcal.
Exercises representative handshakes, reset behavior, frame boundaries, and numeric corner cases for regression runs.

testbenches.name: tb_radif_axi4_axis_dma
testbenches.description:
Self-checking DMA transaction testbench.
This bench programs the RADIF AXI4/AXIS DMA register interface for one
MM2S transfer and one S2MM transfer. The MM2S sequence writes base/end/length
registers, enables MM2S, accepts one AXI read beat at address 0x00000100,
and checks that the read payload appears on the output AXI-Stream port. The
S2MM sequence writes base/end/length registers, enables S2MM, presents one
input AXI-Stream beat, and checks that the DMA emits one AXI write beat at
address 0x00000200 with the expected payload. The waveform should show the
register programming phase followed by AR/R and AW/W/B channel activity.

testbenches.name: tb_radif_axi_lite_to_reg
testbenches.description:
Self-checking or stimulus-focused testbench for axi lite to reg.
Exercises representative handshakes, reset behavior, frame boundaries, and numeric corner cases for regression runs.

testbenches.name: tb_radif_gpio_irq
testbenches.description: Exercises RADIF GPIO and interrupt-controller register behavior.

testbenches.name: tb_radif_i2s_axis
testbenches.description:
Exercises the I2S/AXI-Stream bridge in internally clocked loopback mode.
The waveform shows register-controlled clock dividers, generated MCLK/BCLK/LRCK, AXI input acceptance, I2S serial output, looped-back serial input, and AXI output frame generation.

testbenches.name: tb_radif_interfaces_smoke
testbenches.description:
Interface elaboration and idle-state smoke testbench.
This bench instantiates the RADIF SPI, QSPI, I2C, DMA, and SPI-to-AXI blocks
together to catch compile/elaboration issues and verify reset-idle behavior
for shared interface wrappers. It intentionally does not drive complete bus
transactions; it checks that inactive SPI/QSPI pins remain tri-stated after
reset. Use the module-specific testbenches for transaction waveforms.

testbenches.name: tb_radif_reg_bank
testbenches.description:
Self-checking or stimulus-focused testbench for reg bank.
Exercises representative handshakes, reset behavior, frame boundaries, and numeric corner cases for regression runs.

testbenches.name: tb_radif_reg_interconnect
testbenches.description:
Self-checking or stimulus-focused testbench for reg interconnect.
Exercises representative handshakes, reset behavior, frame boundaries, and numeric corner cases for regression runs.

testbenches.name: tb_radif_reg_to_i2c_master
testbenches.description:
Exercises the register-controlled I2C master with always-acknowledging open-drain bus behavior.
The waveform shows register launch, START, address byte, write data byte, ACK sampling, STOP, and completion status.

testbenches.name: tb_radif_reg_to_spi_master
testbenches.description:
Exercises the register-controlled 4-wire SPI master with a looped-back MISO/MOSI path.
The waveform shows software register writes, chip-select assertion, generated SCLK pulses, MOSI output shifting, MISO input sampling, and transaction completion status.

testbenches.name: tb_radif_smi16_to_reg
testbenches.description:
Self-checking or stimulus-focused testbench for smi16 to reg.
Exercises representative handshakes, reset behavior, frame boundaries, and numeric corner cases for regression runs.

testbenches.name: tb_xfft_1024_latency
testbenches.description:
Simulation testbench for measuring Xilinx FFT 1024-point latency.
Drives representative frames through the generated FFT IP and records timing behavior for comparison with RadFFT alternatives.

register_maps.name: RadDebugHub
register_maps.description: Controls RadILA capture arming, trigger matching, status reporting, and capture-buffer readback through the shared RADIF register interface.

registers.name: id
registers.description: Constant ASCII identifier for the RadILA debug hub.

fields.name: ID
fields.description: Reads as 0x52414449, the ASCII tag RADI.

registers.name: version
registers.description: Hardware register-map version and compatibility word.

fields.name: VERSION
fields.description: Encodes the debug hub register contract version used by host tools.

registers.name: control
registers.description: Issues capture commands and configures optional interrupt and auto-rearm behavior.

fields.name: ARM
fields.description: Writing 1 arms the analyzer and starts capture when the trigger condition is met.

fields.name: SW_TRIG
fields.description: Writing 1 injects a software trigger into the command stream.

fields.name: CLEAR
fields.description: Writing 1 clears capture state, sticky done indication, counters, and command framing.

fields.name: AUTO_REARM
fields.description: When set, the capture engine automatically returns to the armed state after completing a capture.

fields.name: IRQ_EN
fields.description: When set, irq_o asserts while STATUS.DONE is set.

registers.name: status
registers.description: Reports analyzer state and captured sample count.

fields.name: ARMED
fields.description: Set while the analyzer is armed and waiting for a trigger.

fields.name: CAPTURING
fields.description: Set while samples are being written into the capture buffer.

fields.name: DONE
fields.description: Set after the configured capture window has completed.

fields.name: OVERFLOW
fields.description: Set when capture activity exceeds the configured buffer accounting.

fields.name: COUNT
fields.description: Number of samples captured or retained by the current capture window.

registers.name: trig_mask
registers.description: Selects which event_i bits participate in hardware trigger comparison.

fields.name: TRIG_MASK
fields.description: A mask bit of 1 enables comparison for the corresponding event_i bit.

registers.name: trig_value
registers.description: Expected event value after applying TRIG_MASK.

fields.name: TRIG_VALUE
fields.description: The analyzer triggers when event_i masked by TRIG_MASK equals this masked value.

registers.name: pretrig
registers.description: Reserved pre-trigger depth configuration field retained for host API compatibility.

fields.name: PRETRIG
fields.description: Reserved for future pre-trigger capture-window selection.

registers.name: posttrig
registers.description: Number of post-trigger samples to capture after the trigger condition is accepted.

fields.name: POSTTRIG
fields.description: Post-trigger capture count. Values wider than ADDR_WIDTH are ignored by the configured hardware instance.

registers.name: data_index
registers.description: Capture-buffer read index used by SAMPLE_DATA registers.

fields.name: DATA_INDEX
fields.description: Selects the capture-buffer sample address returned by SAMPLE_DATA0 through SAMPLE_DATA3.

registers.name: sample_data0
registers.description: Low 32 bits of the captured sample selected by DATA_INDEX.

fields.name: SAMPLE_DATA0
fields.description: Captured sample bits 31 downto 0.

registers.name: sample_now0
registers.description: Low 32 bits of the live sample input synchronized into the register clock domain.

fields.name: SAMPLE_NOW0
fields.description: Live sample_i bits 31 downto 0.

registers.name: event_now
registers.description: Current event metadata synchronized into the register clock domain.

fields.name: EVENT_NOW
fields.description: Live event_i value observed by the analyzer.

registers.name: caps
registers.description: Static hardware capability word for host discovery.

fields.name: EVENT_WIDTH
fields.description: Configured width of event_i in bits.

fields.name: SAMPLE_WIDTH
fields.description: Configured width of sample_i in bits.

registers.name: sample_data1
registers.description: Captured sample bits 63 downto 32 when SAMPLE_WIDTH is greater than 32.

fields.name: SAMPLE_DATA1
fields.description: Upper captured sample word for wider analyzer instances.

registers.name: sample_data2
registers.description: Captured sample bits 95 downto 64 when SAMPLE_WIDTH is greater than 64.

fields.name: SAMPLE_DATA2
fields.description: Additional captured sample word for wide analyzer instances.

registers.name: sample_data3
registers.description: Captured sample bits 127 downto 96 when SAMPLE_WIDTH is greater than 96.

fields.name: SAMPLE_DATA3
fields.description: Additional captured sample word for wide analyzer instances.

register_maps.name: raddsp_axis_am_iq_demodulator
register_maps.description: Controls tuned I/Q carrier rotation, envelope detection, and sample-count observation.

registers.name: control
registers.description: Controls stream processing and carrier-rotation source selection.

fields.name: enable
fields.description: Enables stream processing. When clear, accepted input samples are dropped and no output samples are emitted.

fields.name: internal_dds
fields.description: Enables internal DDS carrier rotation before envelope magnitude calculation.

fields.name: bypass
fields.description: Bypasses carrier rotation and computes magnitude directly from the incoming I/Q sample.

fields.name: phase_reset
fields.description: Write-one strobe that clears the internal DDS phase accumulator.

registers.name: status
registers.description: Reports output-valid and input-ready status.

fields.name: out_valid
fields.description: Set when an output envelope sample is currently valid.

fields.name: input_ready
fields.description: Set when the block can accept an input I/Q sample.

registers.name: phase_inc
registers.description: Internal DDS phase increment applied after each accepted sample.

fields.name: phase_inc
fields.description: Unsigned phase tuning word. Larger values increase the demodulator rotation frequency; one full accumulator wrap equals one carrier cycle.

registers.name: phase_offset
registers.description: Static phase offset added to the accumulator before carrier-rotation lookup.

fields.name: phase_offset
fields.description: Unsigned phase offset added to the DDS accumulator before demodulator sine/cosine lookup.

registers.name: phase
registers.description: Current internal DDS phase accumulator value.

fields.name: phase
fields.description: Current unsigned DDS phase accumulator value.

registers.name: sample_count
registers.description: Counts accepted and emitted samples. Write bit 0 as one to clear the counter.

fields.name: sample_count
fields.description: Current emitted-sample count. Writing bit 0 as one clears the counter.

register_maps.name: raddsp_axis_am_iq_modulator
register_maps.description: Controls AM envelope modulation, internal/external carrier selection, DDS tuning, and sample-count observation.

registers.name: control
registers.description: Controls stream processing and carrier source selection.

fields.name: enable
fields.description: Enables stream processing. When clear, accepted input samples are dropped and no output samples are emitted.

fields.name: internal_dds
fields.description: Selects the internal DDS carrier. When clear, carrier_i_i and carrier_q_i provide the carrier samples.

fields.name: bypass
fields.description: Passes the envelope to the I lane and drives Q to zero without carrier multiplication.

fields.name: phase_reset
fields.description: Write-one strobe that clears the internal DDS phase accumulator.

registers.name: status
registers.description: Reports output-valid and input-ready status.

fields.name: out_valid
fields.description: Set when an output I/Q sample is currently valid.

fields.name: input_ready
fields.description: Set when the block can accept an input envelope sample.

registers.name: phase_inc
registers.description: Internal DDS phase increment applied after each accepted sample.

fields.name: phase_inc
fields.description: Unsigned phase tuning word. Larger values increase carrier frequency; one full accumulator wrap equals one carrier cycle.

registers.name: phase_offset
registers.description: Static phase offset added to the accumulator before carrier lookup.

fields.name: phase_offset
fields.description: Unsigned phase offset added to the DDS accumulator before sine/cosine lookup.

registers.name: phase
registers.description: Current internal DDS phase accumulator value.

fields.name: phase
fields.description: Current unsigned DDS phase accumulator value.

registers.name: sample_count
registers.description: Counts accepted and emitted samples. Write bit 0 as one to clear the counter.

fields.name: sample_count
fields.description: Current emitted-sample count. Writing bit 0 as one clears the counter.

register_maps.name: raddsp_axis_radfft_ddr
register_maps.description: Software-visible control block for launching DDR-to-FFT, FFT-to-DDR, AXI-stream-to-DDR, and DDR-to-AXI-stream transfers.

registers.name: control
registers.description: Control register used to configure and control this block.

fields.name: start command
fields.description: Starts the selected operation.

fields.name: operation mode
fields.description: Selects the operating mode.

fields.name: interrupt enable
fields.description: Enables interrupt generation for the associated event.

fields.name: clear sticky status flags
fields.description: Clears the associated sticky status flag(s).

registers.name: status
registers.description: bit 0: busy; bit 1: done; bit 2: error; bit 3: unsupported configuration

fields.name: busy
fields.description: Indicates that the block is actively processing.

fields.name: done
fields.description: Indicates that the selected operation completed.

fields.name: error
fields.description: Indicates that the block detected an error condition.

fields.name: unsupported configuration
fields.description: Unsupported configuration.

registers.name: base_addr_lo
registers.description: Low 32 bits of the primary DDR source/base address.

registers.name: base_addr_hi
registers.description: High address bits of the primary DDR source/base address when the configured AXI address width exceeds 32 bits.

registers.name: out_addr_lo
registers.description: Low 32 bits of the output DDR address. A zero value selects in-place output for supported operations.

registers.name: out_addr_hi
registers.description: High address bits of the output DDR address when the configured AXI address width exceeds 32 bits.

registers.name: length_bytes
registers.description: Transfer length in bytes. FFT operations require this to match the active frame size.

registers.name: region_bytes
registers.description: DDR region size used for range planning and default frame-region handling.

registers.name: fft_points
registers.description: bits 7 downto 0: log2 FFT point count; bits 23 downto 16: AXI bytes per beat on readback

fields.name: log2 FFT point count
fields.description: Log2 FFT point count.

fields.name: AXI bytes per beat on readback
fields.display_name: AXI BYTES PER BEAT ON READBACK
fields.description: AXI bytes per beat on readback.

registers.name: burst_beats
registers.description: bits 7 downto 0: requested AXI burst length in beats, clamped internally to the configured maximum

fields.name: requested AXI burst length in beats
fields.display_name: REQUESTED AXI BURST LENGTH IN BEATS
fields.description: Requested AXI burst length in beats.

registers.name: write_current
registers.description: Current low 32-bit AXI write address for active or recently completed stream-to-DDR activity.

registers.name: read_current
registers.description: Current low 32-bit AXI read address for active or recently completed DDR-to-stream or FFT input activity.

registers.name: twiddle_addr_lo
registers.description: Low 32 bits of the DDR address containing FFT twiddle-table data.

registers.name: twiddle_addr_hi
registers.description: High address bits of the FFT twiddle-table DDR address when the configured AXI address width exceeds 32 bits.

registers.name: fft_config
registers.description: Control register used to configure and control this block.

fields.name: radix-4 enable
fields.description: Radix 4 enable.

fields.name: reserved radix mode
fields.description: Selects the operating mode.

fields.name: reserved parallel mode
fields.description: Selects the operating mode.

fields.name: cross-correlation mode
fields.description: Selects the operating mode.

fields.name: input width code
fields.description: Input width code.

fields.name: output width code
fields.description: Output width code.

fields.name: lane-count code
fields.description: Lane count code.

registers.description: Read-only signature value 0x52464444 identifying the RadFFT DDR register block.

registers.name: fft_limits
registers.description: bits 7 downto 0: maximum log2 FFT points; bits 15 downto 8: maximum input width; bits 23 downto 16: maximum output width; bits 31 downto 24: twiddle width

fields.description: Maximum log2 FFT points.

fields.description: Twiddle width.

registers.description: bit 0: radix-2 support; bit 1: radix-4 support; bit 2: DDR FFT support; bit 3: cross-correlation support; bits 15 downto 8: maximum multiplier lanes; bits 23 downto 16: AXI bytes per beat; bits 31 downto 24: maximum burst beats

fields.name: radix-2 support
fields.description: Radix 2 support.

fields.name: radix-4 support
fields.description: Radix 4 support.

fields.name: DDR FFT support
fields.description: DDR FFT support.

fields.description: Cross correlation support.

fields.name: maximum multiplier lanes

fields.name: AXI bytes per beat
fields.description: AXI bytes per beat.

fields.name: maximum burst beats
fields.description: Maximum burst beats.

registers.name: batch_count
registers.description: Number of frames to process. A written value of zero is coerced to one.

registers.name: src_stride_bytes
registers.description: Byte stride between source frames for batched FFT operation. Zero selects the active frame size.

registers.name: dst_stride_bytes
registers.description: Byte stride between destination frames for batched FFT operation. Zero selects the active frame size.

registers.name: batch_done_count
registers.description: Number of frames completed in the current or most recent batched operation.

registers.description: Low 32 bits of the secondary input address used by cross-correlation mode.

registers.description: High address bits of the secondary cross-correlation input address when the configured AXI address width exceeds 32 bits.

registers.name: corr_scratch_addr_lo
registers.description: Low 32 bits of the scratch/output workspace address used during cross-correlation processing.

registers.name: corr_scratch_addr_hi
registers.description: High address bits of the cross-correlation scratch workspace address when the configured AXI address width exceeds 32 bits.

register_maps.name: radif_gpio_reg_block
register_maps.description: Controls GPIO output values, output enables, input readback, edge detection, and interrupt masking.

registers.name: out_value
registers.description: GPIO output drive values.

fields.name: GPIO_OUT
fields.description: One output value bit per GPIO pin. Bits above GPIO_WIDTH are unused.

registers.name: out_enable
registers.description: GPIO output enable controls.

fields.name: GPIO_OE
fields.description: One output-enable bit per GPIO pin. Bits above GPIO_WIDTH are unused.

registers.name: in_value
registers.description: Synchronized GPIO input values.

fields.name: GPIO_IN
fields.description: One synchronized input value bit per GPIO pin. Bits above GPIO_WIDTH read as zero.

registers.name: irq_status
registers.description: Latched GPIO edge-detect interrupt pending bits.

fields.name: IRQ_PENDING
fields.description: Pending edge bits. Write 1 to clear the corresponding pending bit.

registers.name: irq_mask
registers.description: GPIO interrupt enable mask.

fields.name: IRQ_MASK
fields.description: A bit value of 1 allows the corresponding pending bit to assert irq_o.

registers.name: rise_enable
registers.description: Rising-edge interrupt detection enable bits.

fields.name: RISE_EN
fields.description: A bit value of 1 latches a pending interrupt when the corresponding GPIO input rises.

registers.name: fall_enable
registers.description: Falling-edge interrupt detection enable bits.

fields.name: FALL_EN
fields.description: A bit value of 1 latches a pending interrupt when the corresponding GPIO input falls.

register_maps.name: radif_i2s_axis
register_maps.description: Controls I2S receive/transmit enables, generated clock dividers, LRCK framing, and transfer counters.

registers.name: control
registers.description: Controls the enabled audio datapaths and clears the software-visible transfer counters.

fields.name: I2S_TO_AXIS_EN
fields.description: Enables the I2S serial receive path. When set, completed left/right I2S samples are packed into AXI-Stream output frames.

fields.name: AXIS_TO_I2S_EN
fields.description: Enables the I2S serial transmit path. When set, AXI-Stream input frames are accepted and shifted out as left/right I2S samples.

fields.name: CLEAR
fields.description: Writing 1 clears RX_COUNT, TX_COUNT, and any sticky status bits. Software should write this as a pulse and then restore the desired enable bits.

registers.name: status
registers.description: Reports active transfer state and elaboration-time clocking modes for the I2S bridge.

fields.name: ACTIVE
fields.description: Set while an RX AXI-Stream frame is waiting to be accepted or a TX AXI-Stream frame is loaded for serial output.

fields.name: EXT_MCLK_MODE
fields.description: Set when the core was elaborated with USE_EXTERNAL_MCLK true.

fields.name: EXT_BCLK_MODE
fields.description: Set when the core was elaborated with USE_EXTERNAL_BCLK true and BCLK/LRCK are sampled from external pins.

fields.name: NO_MCLK_MODE
fields.description: Set when the core was elaborated with NO_MCLK true and the generated MCLK output is disabled.

registers.name: mclk_div
registers.description: Generated MCLK divider used when the core owns MCLK generation.

fields.name: MCLK_DIV
fields.description: MCLK half-period divider. The generated MCLK output toggles every MCLK_DIV + 1 FPGA clock cycles when USE_EXTERNAL_MCLK and NO_MCLK are both false.

registers.name: bclk_div
registers.description: Generated BCLK divider used when the core owns BCLK/LRCK generation.

fields.name: BCLK_DIV
fields.description: BCLK half-period divider. The generated BCLK output toggles every BCLK_DIV + 1 FPGA clock cycles when USE_EXTERNAL_BCLK is false.

registers.name: lrck_bits
registers.description: Configures the generated LRCK frame length.

fields.name: LRCK_HALF_FRAME_BITS
fields.description: Number of BCLK rising edges in each LRCK half-frame. Typical I2S operation uses the sample slot width, such as 32 for 24-bit audio in 32-bit slots.

registers.name: rx_count
registers.description: Counts stereo frames emitted by the I2S-to-AXI-Stream receive path.

fields.name: RX_FRAME_COUNT
fields.description: Monotonic count of completed left/right stereo frames presented on M_AXIS. Cleared by CONTROL.CLEAR or reset.

registers.name: tx_count
registers.description: Counts stereo frames consumed by the AXI-Stream-to-I2S transmit path.

fields.name: TX_FRAME_COUNT
fields.description: Monotonic count of AXI-Stream stereo frames accepted and shifted out on I2S. Cleared by CONTROL.CLEAR or reset.

register_maps.name: radif_irq_controller
register_maps.description: Aggregates interrupt sources into masked pending status and one shared interrupt output.

registers.name: control
registers.description: Configures global interrupt output behavior.

fields.name: GLOBAL_EN
fields.description: When set, masked pending bits may assert irq_o.

registers.name: status
registers.description: Summarized interrupt controller state.

fields.name: GLOBAL_EN
fields.description: Current global interrupt enable state.

fields.name: MASKED_PENDING
fields.description: Set when any pending interrupt is enabled by MASK.

registers.name: mask
registers.description: Per-source interrupt mask.

fields.name: IRQ_MASK
fields.description: A bit value of 1 enables the corresponding source pending bit.

registers.name: pending
registers.description: Latched interrupt pending bits.

fields.name: IRQ_PENDING
fields.description: Current pending bits. Writes replace the pending register.

registers.name: clear
registers.description: Write-one-to-clear pending bits.

fields.name: IRQ_CLEAR
fields.description: Writing 1 clears the corresponding pending bit.

registers.name: force
registers.description: Software force register for pending bits.

fields.name: IRQ_FORCE
fields.description: Writing 1 sets the corresponding pending bit.

register_maps.name: radif_reg_to_i2c_master
register_maps.description: Controls one-byte I2C read/write transactions and SCL timing.

registers.name: control
registers.description: Launches one-byte I2C transactions and clears sticky completion/error status.

fields.name: START
fields.description: Writing 1 starts a one-byte I2C transaction when the master is idle. START is ignored as a stored level by transaction logic after the launch cycle.

fields.name: CLEAR
fields.description: Writing 1 clears STATUS.DONE and STATUS.ACK_ERR. Software should write this as a pulse before launching another transaction when it wants fresh status.

fields.name: READ
fields.description: Selects transaction direction. 1 performs an I2C byte read from SLAVE_ADDR, 0 performs an I2C byte write using TX_DATA.

registers.name: status
registers.description: Reports current I2C transaction state and sticky completion/error status.

fields.name: BUSY
fields.description: Set while the I2C state machine is actively generating START, address, data, acknowledge, or STOP phases.

fields.name: DONE
fields.description: Sticky completion bit set when the most recent transaction reaches STOP. Cleared by CONTROL.CLEAR, a new START, or reset.

fields.name: ACK_ERR
fields.description: Sticky error bit set when the target does not acknowledge the address byte or write data byte, or when START is requested while BUSY.

registers.name: clk_div
registers.description: Configures the I2C SCL phase timing derived from the FPGA/register clock.

fields.name: SCL_DIV
fields.description: SCL half-period divider. The I2C state machine advances each SCL phase every SCL_DIV + 1 FPGA clock cycles.

registers.name: slave_addr
registers.description: Stores the 7-bit I2C target address used by the next transaction.

fields.name: SLAVE_ADDR
fields.description: Unshifted 7-bit I2C slave address. The core appends CONTROL.READ as the R/W bit during the address phase.

registers.name: tx_data
registers.description: Stores the data byte used by the next I2C write transaction.

fields.name: TX_BYTE
fields.description: One byte transmitted after the slave address when CONTROL.READ is 0.

registers.name: rx_data
registers.description: Returns the data byte captured by the most recent I2C read transaction.

fields.name: RX_BYTE
fields.description: One byte sampled from SDA during the data phase when CONTROL.READ is 1.

register_maps.name: radif_reg_to_spi_master
register_maps.description: Controls single-word SPI transfers, SCLK timing, transfer width, and SPI mode.

registers.name: control
registers.description: Launches single-word SPI transfers and clears sticky completion/error status.

fields.name: START
fields.description: Writing 1 starts a SPI transfer when the master is idle. The transfer uses CONFIG, CLK_DIV, and TX_DATA values already written before START.

fields.name: CLEAR
fields.description: Writing 1 clears STATUS.DONE and STATUS.ERR. Software should write this as a pulse when it wants fresh transaction status.

registers.name: status
registers.description: Reports current SPI transfer state and sticky completion/error status.

fields.name: BUSY
fields.description: Set while chip select is asserted or bits are actively being shifted on SCLK.

fields.name: DONE
fields.description: Sticky completion bit set after the configured number of bits has been shifted and chip select is released.

fields.name: ERR
fields.description: Sticky error bit set when START is requested while BUSY or an unsupported register access is attempted.

registers.name: clk_div
registers.description: Configures the SPI SCLK timing derived from the FPGA/register clock.

fields.name: SCLK_DIV
fields.description: SCLK half-period divider. The generated SCLK phase changes every SCLK_DIV + 1 FPGA clock cycles.

registers.name: config
registers.description: Configures SPI clock mode, chip-select polarity, and transfer width.

fields.name: CPOL
fields.description: SPI clock polarity. 0 idles SCLK low, 1 idles SCLK high.

fields.name: CPHA
fields.description: SPI clock phase. 0 samples MISO on the first active clock edge, 1 samples MISO on the second active clock edge.

fields.name: CS_ACTIVE_HIGH
fields.description: Chip-select polarity selector. 0 drives spi_cs_n_o low during transfers, 1 inverts the output polarity for active-high chip-select wiring.

fields.name: BIT_COUNT
fields.description: Number of bits shifted during each transfer. Values below 1 clamp to 1 and values above DATA_WIDTH clamp to DATA_WIDTH.

registers.name: tx_data
registers.description: Stores the MSB-first MOSI transmit word used by the next SPI transfer. Reads return the transmit holding register, not sampled MISO data.

fields.name: TX_WORD
fields.description: MOSI transmit shift word. The core begins with TX_WORD[31], so transfers shorter than 32 bits should place the intended output payload in the most-significant bits.

registers.name: rx_data
registers.description: Returns the MSB-first MISO receive word captured by the most recent SPI transfer.

fields.name: RX_WORD
fields.description: MISO receive shift word. For transfers shorter than 32 bits, sampled input bits are accumulated into the least-significant bits in transfer order after the configured number of clocks.

register_maps.name: radif_uart_to_reg
register_maps.description: The UART bridge has no local configuration registers; it forwards binary UART commands to downstream RADIF register targets.

registers.name: write_frame
registers.description: UART write command frame.

fields.name: CMD
fields.description: First byte is 0x57 for write.

fields.name: ADDR
fields.description: Two-byte big-endian byte address.

fields.name: DATA
fields.description: Four-byte big-endian 32-bit write data.

registers.name: read_frame
registers.description: UART read command frame.

fields.name: CMD
fields.description: First byte is 0x52 for read.

fields.name: ADDR
fields.description: Two-byte big-endian byte address.
